title: Reverse interview a persona candidate for role fit
goal: Qualify a persona candidate for a specific line of work and identify missing PersonaKit artifacts needed for reliable execution.

steps.text: Load candidate persona context plus related kits, directives, intents, and sessions.
Define role requirements and target confidence threshold for this assessment (default threshold is 80 when omitted).
Map role requirements to candidate strengths and observed gaps.
Run reverse-interview analysis across domain fit, delivery fit, risk fit, collaboration fit, and tooling fit with explicit evidence references.
Score confidence using hiring rubric and record unknowns.
If confidence is below threshold or unknowns are material, run `persona-hiring-research-loop`, then re-score before issuing final verdict.
Produce a qualification verdict and prioritized gap list with severity and confidence percent.
Write or update a markdown report at `Docs/PersonaKit/Development/hiring-reviews/YYYY-MM-DD-<personaId>.md` unless an approved override path is provided.
Append one machine-readable entry to `Docs/PersonaKit/Development/logs/persona-hiring-reviews.jsonl` following the schema contract.
Recommend missing essentials/kits/intents/directives/sessions and a first implementation step.
Pause for AJ review before applying any candidate or pack artifact updates.
Apply only approved updates and run validation.

acceptanceCriteria: Qualification verdict is explicit, evidence-backed, and includes confidence percent
Strengths and gaps map directly to role requirements
Unknowns are explicitly listed and risk-labeled
Low-confidence cases trigger research loop and post-research re-score
Markdown report path is explicit and populated
JSONL entry is appended using hiring log contract fields
Missing artifact recommendations are grouped by type and prioritized
No structural updates occur without AJ review approval
Validation status is recorded after approved updates

verification.text: Confirm reverse-interview output includes verdict, confidence score, strengths, gaps, and top recommended artifacts
Confirm unknowns and evidence references are present
Confirm low-confidence output includes research-loop rerun results or explicit stop-for-guidance
Confirm report file exists and matches output contract sections
Confirm JSONL entry includes required contract fields and valid reportPath
Confirm missing-artifact list includes at least one concrete first step
Confirm validation results are captured after approved updates
